==General Info==
Home Resources are the assets you can gather from [[Home Base#The Pond|The Pond]]. The Pond is also known as The Courtyard or the Home Facility in the game. These resources are B-Tads, Fungus, Travel Speedups, Wood, and Stone. 

The amount you collect from tapping the Courtyard is dependent on the levels of the buildings in the Courtyard, the relics you have slotted into them, your relics in your possession, and many other factors. There are many factors that change the amounts of the daily output, the max capacity, and the special power besides just the level. As such, those amounts will not be shown in the building level tables, only the costs and the amount of relic slots will be noted.

Each building in the Courtyard has a special power as well. 

Getting 30 Relic Stars is what unlocks the ability to click on the wooden sign, upgrade buildings, slot one relic into buildings, and have the option to buy the Lumber Camp and the Quarry.

===Home Value Packs===
[[Value_Packs#Home_Value_Pack|Home Value Packs]] can be purchased after certain milestones are met.

===Upgrade Costs Calculations===
There are a lot of building discounts that lower the costs of buildings. In later game, you'll not see a single cost at it's actual base cost. 

Since the costs don't mean anything to you without you knowing what discounts I have, I'm reverse engineering the costs to a close approximation of their original value. All values in the tables below are as close to their base value as I can approximate. There are many rounding issues and it's hard to get an exact value for each building level. 

Fortunately, the calculations for each buildings level costs are consistent across every building at the same level. Each building needs the same amount of total materials (stone + wood), B-Tads, and Relic Stars for each level. The difference is the distribution per building type of materials. Each building has a different percentage of stone and wood they need from the total amount of materials for each level.

The distribution of materials is as follows for each building type.
{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!Building Name!!Percentage of {{RewardIconWithText|Stone}}!!Percentage of {{RewardIconWithText|Wood}}
|-
|Tadpole Pond||75%||25%
|-
|Fungus Farm||25%||75%
|-
|Time Machine||50%||50%
|-
|Lumber Camp||75%||25%
|-
|Quarry||25%||75%
|}

The values for each level are in the following table.
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level!!Total Materials!!{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}!!Total Relic Stars
|-
|1||0||0||30
|-
|2||80||300||50
|-
|3||120||450||60
|-
|4||160||600||70
|-
|5||320||1,200||80
|-
|6||480||1,800||90
|-
|7||680||2,560||100
|-
|8||840||3,180||110
|-
|9||1,040||3,870||120
|-
|10||1,200||4,600||130
|-
|11||1,600||6,000||140
|-
|12||2,000||7,550||150
|-
|13||2,480||9,260||160
|-
|14||2,960||11.1k||170
|-
|15||3,600||13.4k||180
|-
|16||4,240||15.9k||190
|-
|17||4,960||18.6k||200
|-
|18||5,720||21.5k||210
|-
|19||6,640||24.9k||220
|-
|20||7,600||28.5k||230
|-
|21||8,600||32.3k||240
|-
|22||9,680||36.4k||250
|-
|23||10,960||41.1k||260
|-
|24||12,280||46k||270
|-
|25||13,600||51.2k||280
|-
|26||15,080||56.7k||290
|-
|27||17.1k||64k||300
|-
|28||18.9k||70.6k||310
|-
|29||20.7k||77.5k||320
|-
|30||22.6k||84.6k||330
|-
|31||24.7k||92.6k||340
|-
|32||27k||101k||350
|-
|33||29.3k||110k||360
|-
|34||31.7k||118k||370
|-
|35||34.3k||128k||380
|-
|36||36.6k||137k||390
|-
|37||38.8k||146k||400
|-
|38||42k||157k||410
|-
|39||45.2k||169k||420
|-
|40||48.4k||182k||430
|-
|41||51.9k||196k||440
|-
|42||55.5k||208k||450
|-
|43||60.8k||224k||460
|-
|44||64.8k||239k||470
|-
|45||69k||255k||480
|-
|46||73.5k||271k||500
|-
|47||78.4k||288k||520
|-
|48||83.7k||308k||540
|-
|49||88.2k||326k||560
|-
|50||93.9k||345k||580
|-
|51||99.4k||365k||600
|-
|52||102k||383k||630
|-
|53||108k||404k||660
|-
|54||113k||425k||690
|-
|55||120k||450k||720
|-
|56||126k||473k||760
|-
|57||133k||497k||800
|-
|58||139k||521k||850
|-
|59||147k||551k||900
|-
|60||156k||583k||950
|-
|61||164k||615k||1,000
|-
|62||173k||650k||1,050
|-
|63||182k||683k||1,100
|-
|64||192k||719k||1,150
|-
|65||202k||757k||1,200
|-
|66||211k||795k||1,250
|-
|67||222k||834k||1,300
|-
|68||233k||874k||1,350
|-
|69||243k||915k||1,400
|-
|70||254k||956k||1,450
|-
|71||266k||1.000M||1,500
|-
|72||277k||1.039M||1,550
|-
|73||289k||1.089M||1,600
|-
|74||302k||1.129M||1,650
|-
|75||314k||1.179M||1,700
|-
|76||325k||1.229M||1,720
|-
|77||339k||1.269M||1,740
|-
|78||351k||1.319M||1,760
|-
|79||366k||1.369M||1,780
|-
|80||379k||1.418M||1,800
|-
|81||392k||1.479M||1,820
|-
|82||407k||1.525M||1,840
|-
|83||419k||1.578M||1,860
|-
|84||435k||1.637M||1,880
|-
|85||451k||1.688M||1,900
|-
|86||463k||1.744M||1,910
|-
|87||479k||1.794M||1,920
|-
|88||495k||1.852M||1,930
|-
|89||511k||1.912M||1,940
|-
|90||527k||1.967M||1,950
|-
|91||543k||2.033M||1,960
|-
|92||554k||2.094M||1,970
|-
|93||569k||2.166M||1,980
|-
|94||585k||2.225M||1,990
|-
|95||604k||2.283M||1,995
|-
|96||624k||2.352M||1,997
|-
|97||644k||2.410M||1,998
|-
|98||664k||2.478M||1,999
|-
|99||688k||2.551M||2,000
|}

Knowing these values I've calculated the total amount of materials for each level using as many data points across the buildings as possible. This will give better results to the final values below.

===Relic Slots===
Building all have Relic Slots in them that allow you to place a Relic in the building to enhance it's production. All buildings Unlock the first slot at Level 1, the second slot at Level 15, and the third and final slot at Level 35.

===Snail Avatars===
The [[Snail_Avatar#Mirage_I_Avatar|Mirage I Avatar]] category is completely about Home Resources and their buildings. Leveling up this Avatar category will give discounts to building costs and increase production of buildings.

===Upgrade Cost Reduction for All Buildings===
[[:Category:Building Upgrade Cost Reduction]]

==Tadpole Pond==
The Tadpole Pond generates {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}s normally and has the special power to generate {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}}s as well.

===Upgrade Costs===
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
! rowspan="2" |Level
! colspan="4" |Cost

|-
!{{RewardIconWithText|Stone}}
!{{RewardIconWithText|Wood}}
!{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
!Total<br>Relic Stars

|-
|1||0||0||0||30
|-
|2||60||20||300||50
|-
|3||90||30||450||60
|-
|4||120||40||600||70
|-
|5||240||80||1,200||80
|-
|6||360||120||1,800||90
|-
|7||510||170||2,560||100
|-
|8||630||210||3,180||110
|-
|9||780||260||3,870||120
|-
|10||900||300||4,600||130
|-
|11||1,200||400||6,000||140
|-
|12||1,500||500||7,550||150
|-
|13||1,860||620||9,260||160
|-
|14||2,220||740||11.1k||170
|-
|15||2,700||900||13.4k||180
|-
|16||3,180||1,060||15.9k||190
|-
|17||3,720||1,240||18.6k||200
|-
|18||4,290||1,430||21.5k||210
|-
|19||4,980||1,660||24.9k||220
|-
|20||5,700||1,900||28.5k||230
|-
|21||6,450||2,150||32.3k||240
|-
|22||7,260||2,420||36.4k||250
|-
|23||8,220||2,740||41.1k||260
|-
|24||9,210||3,070||46k||270
|-
|25||10.2k||3,400||51.2k||280
|-
|26||11.3k||3,770||56.7k||290
|-
|27||12.8k||4,275||64k||300
|-
|28||14.2k||4,725||70.6k||310
|-
|29||15.5k||5,175||77.5k||320
|-
|30||17k||5,650||84.6k||330
|-
|31||18.5k||6,175||92.6k||340
|-
|32||20.3k||6,750||101k||350
|-
|33||22k||7,325||110k||360
|-
|34||23.8k||7,925||118k||370
|-
|35||25.7k||8,575||128k||380
|-
|36||27.5k||9,150||137k||390
|-
|37||29.1k||9,700||146k||400
|-
|38||31.5k||10.5k||157k||410
|-
|39||33.9k||11.3k||169k||420
|-
|40||36.3k||12.1k||182k||430
|-
|41||38.9k||13k||196k||440
|-
|42||41.6k||13.9k||208k||450
|-
|43||45.6k||15.2k||224k||460
|-
|44||48.6k||16.2k||239k||470
|-
|45||51.8k||17.3k||255k||480
|-
|46||55.1k||18.4k||271k||500
|-
|47||58.8k||19.6k||288k||520
|-
|48||62.8k||20.9k||308k||540
|-
|49||66.2k||22.1k||326k||560
|-
|50||70.4k||23.5k||345k||580
|-
|51||74.6k||24.9k||365k||600
|-
|52||76.5k||25.5k||383k||630
|-
|53||81k||27k||404k||660
|-
|54||84.8k||28.3k||425k||690
|-
|55||90k||30k||450k||720
|-
|56||94.5k||31.5k||473k||760
|-
|57||99.8k||33.3k||497k||800
|-
|58||104k||34.8k||521k||850
|-
|59||110k||36.8k||551k||900
|-
|60||117k||39k||583k||950
|-
|61||123k||41k||615k||1,000
|-
|62||130k||43.3k||650k||1,050
|-
|63||137k||45.5k||683k||1,100
|-
|64||144k||48k||719k||1,150
|-
|65||152k||50.5k||757k||1,200
|-
|66||158k||52.8k||795k||1,250
|-
|67||167k||55.5k||834k||1,300
|-
|68||175k||58.3k||874k||1,350
|-
|69||182k||60.8k||915k||1,400
|-
|70||191k||63.5k||956k||1,450
|-
|71||200k||66.5k||1.000M||1,500
|-
|72||208k||69.3k||1.039M||1,550
|-
|73||217k||72.3k||1.089M||1,600
|-
|74||227k||75.5k||1.129M||1,650
|-
|75||236k||78.5k||1.179M||1,700
|-
|76||244k||81.3k||1.229M||1,720
|-
|77||254k||84.8k||1.269M||1,740
|-
|78||263k||87.8k||1.319M||1,760
|-
|79||275k||91.5k||1.369M||1,780
|-
|80||284k||94.8k||1.418M||1,800
|-
|81||294k||98k||1.479M||1,820
|-
|82||305k||102k||1.525M||1,840
|-
|83||314k||105k||1.578M||1,860
|-
|84||326k||109k||1.637M||1,880
|-
|85||338k||113k||1.688M||1,900
|-
|86||347k||116k||1.744M||1,910
|-
|87||359k||120k||1.794M||1,920
|-
|88||371k||124k||1.852M||1,930
|-
|89||383k||128k||1.912M||1,940
|-
|90||395k||132k||1.967M||1,950
|-
|91||407k||136k||2.033M||1,960
|-
|92||416k||139k||2.094M||1,970
|-
|93||427k||142k||2.166M||1,980
|-
|94||439k||146k||2.225M||1,990
|-
|95||453k||151k||2.283M||1,995
|-
|96||468k||156k||2.352M||1,997
|-
|97||483k||161k||2.410M||1,998
|-
|98||498k||166k||2.478M||1,999
|-
|99||516k||172k||2.551M||2,000
|}

===Upgrade Cost Reduction===
[[:Category:Tadpole Pond Upgrade Cost Reduction]]

===Relics with Tadpole Pond Skills===
[[:Category:Tadpole Pond Skill]]

==Fungus Farm==
The Fungus Farm generates {{RewardIconWithText|Fungus}} to be used for food for exploration normally and has the special power to generate any type of {{RewardIcon|Wonder Fungus Green}}{{RewardIcon|Wonder Fungus Blue}}{{RewardIcon|Wonder Fungus Purple}}{{RewardIcon|Wonder Fungus Orange}}{{Relink|Wonder Fungus|black|Icons/Wonder_Fungus}} as well.

===Upgrade Costs===
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
! rowspan="2" |Level
! colspan="4" |Cost

|-
!{{RewardIconWithText|Stone}}
!{{RewardIconWithText|Wood}}
!{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
!Total<br>Relic Stars

|-
|1||0||0||0||30
|-
|2||20||60||300||50
|-
|3||30||90||450||60
|-
|4||40||120||600||70
|-
|5||80||240||1,200||80
|-
|6||120||360||1,800||90
|-
|7||170||510||2,560||100
|-
|8||210||630||3,180||110
|-
|9||260||780||3,870||120
|-
|10||300||900||4,600||130
|-
|11||400||1,200||6,000||140
|-
|12||500||1,500||7,550||150
|-
|13||620||1,860||9,260||160
|-
|14||740||2,220||11.1k||170
|-
|15||900||2,700||13.4k||180
|-
|16||1,060||3,180||15.9k||190
|-
|17||1,240||3,720||18.6k||200
|-
|18||1,430||4,290||21.5k||210
|-
|19||1,660||4,980||24.9k||220
|-
|20||1,900||5,700||28.5k||230
|-
|21||2,150||6,450||32.3k||240
|-
|22||2,420||7,260||36.4k||250
|-
|23||2,740||8,220||41.1k||260
|-
|24||3,070||,210||46k||270
|-
|25||3,400||10.2k||51.2k||280
|-
|26||3,770||11.3k||56.7k||290
|-
|27||4,275||12.8k||64k||300
|-
|28||4,725||14.2k||70.6k||310
|-
|29||5,175||15.5k||77.5k||320
|-
|30||5,650||17k||84.6k||330
|-
|31||6,175||18.5k||92.6k||340
|-
|32||6,750||20.3k||101k||350
|-
|33||7,325||22k||110k||360
|-
|34||7,925||23.8k||118k||370
|-
|35||8,575||25.7k||128k||380
|-
|36||9,150||27.5k||137k||390
|-
|37||9,700||29.1k||146k||400
|-
|38||10.5k||31.5k||157k||410
|-
|39||11.3k||33.9k||169k||420
|-
|40||12.1k||36.3k||182k||430
|-
|41||13k||38.9k||196k||440
|-
|42||13.9k||41.6k||208k||450
|-
|43||15.2k||45.6k||224k||460
|-
|44||16.2k||48.6k||239k||470
|-
|45||17.3k||51.8k||255k||480
|-
|46||18.4k||55.1k||271k||500
|-
|47||19.6k||58.8k||288k||520
|-
|48||20.9k||62.8k||308k||540
|-
|49||22.1k||66.2k||326k||560
|-
|50||23.5k||70.4k||345k||580
|-
|51||24.9k||74.6k||365k||600
|-
|52||25.5k||76.5k||383k||630
|-
|53||27k||81k||404k||660
|-
|54||28.3k||84.8k||425k||690
|-
|55||30k||90k||450k||720
|-
|56||31.5k||94.5k||473k||760
|-
|57||33.3k||99.8k||497k||800
|-
|58||34.8k||104k||521k||850
|-
|59||36.8k||110k||551k||900
|-
|60||39k||117k||583k||950
|-
|61||41k||123k||615k||1,000
|-
|62||43.3k||130k||650k||1,050
|-
|63||45.5k||137k||683k||1,100
|-
|64||48k||144k||719k||1,150
|-
|65||50.5k||152k||757k||1,200
|-
|66||52.8k||158k||795k||1,250
|-
|67||55.5k||167k||834k||1,300
|-
|68||58.3k||175k||874k||1,350
|-
|69||60.8k||182k||915k||1,400
|-
|70||63.5k||91k||956k||1,450
|-
|71||66.5k||200k||1.000M||1,500
|-
|72||69.3k||208k||1.039M||1,550
|-
|73||72.3k||217k||1.089M||1,600
|-
|74||75.5k||227k||1.129M||1,650
|-
|75||78.5k||236k||1.179M||1,700
|-
|76||81.3k||244k||1.229M||1,720
|-
|77||84.8k||254k||1.269M||1,740
|-
|78||87.8k||263k||1.319M||1,760
|-
|79||91.5k||275k||1.369M||1,780
|-
|80||94.8k||284k||1.418M||1,800
|-
|81||98k||294k||1.479M||1,820
|-
|82||102k||305k||1.525M||1,840
|-
|83||105k||314k||1.578M||1,860
|-
|84||109k||326k||1.637M||1,880
|-
|85||113k||338k||1.688M||1,900
|-
|86||116k||347k||1.744M||1,910
|-
|87||120k||359k||1.794M||1,920
|-
|88||124k||371k||1.852M||1,930
|-
|89||128k||383k||1.912M||1,940
|-
|90||132k||395k||1.967M||1,950
|-
|91||136k||407k||2.033M||1,960
|-
|92||139k||416k||2.094M||1,970
|-
|93||142k||427k||2.166M||1,980
|-
|94||146k||439k||2.225M||1,990
|-
|95||151k||453k||2.283M||1,995
|-
|96||156k||468k||2.352M||1,997
|-
|97||161k||483k||2.410M||1,998
|-
|98||166k||498k||2.478M||1,999
|-
|99||172k||516k||2.551M||2,000
|}

===Upgrade Cost Reduction===
[[:Category:Fungus Farm Upgrade Cost Reduction]]

===Relics with Fungus Farm Skills===
[[:Category:Fungus Farm Skill]]

==Time Machine==
The Time Machine generates {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup}}s normally and has the special power to generate {{RewardIconWithLink|Time Chest}} as well.

===Upgrade Costs===
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
! rowspan="2" |Level
! colspan="4" |Cost

|-
!{{RewardIconWithText|Stone}}
!{{RewardIconWithText|Wood}}
!{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
!Total<br>Relic Stars

|-
|1||0||0||0||30
|-
|2||40||40||300||50
|-
|3||60||60||450||60
|-
|4||80||80||600||70
|-
|5||160||160||1,200||80
|-
|6||240||240||1,800||90
|-
|7||340||340||2,560||100
|-
|8||420||420||3,180||110
|-
|9||520||520||3,870||120
|-
|10||600||600||4,600||130
|-
|11||800||800||6,000||140
|-
|12||1,000||1,000||7,550||150
|-
|13||1,240||1,240||9,260||160
|-
|14||1,480||1,480||11.1k||170
|-          
|15||1,800||1,800||13.4k||180
|-          
|16||2,120||2,120||15.9k||190
|-          
|17||2,480||2,480||18.6k||200
|-          
|18||2,860||2,860||21.5k||210
|-          
|19||3,320||3,320||24.9k||220
|-          
|20||3,800||3,800||28.5k||230
|-          
|21||4,300||4,300||32.3k||240
|-          
|22||4,840||4,840||36.4k||250
|-          
|23||5,480||5,480||41.1k||260
|-          
|24||6,140||6,140||46k||270
|-          
|25||6,800||6,800||51.2k||280
|-          
|26||7,540||7,540||56.7k||290
|-          
|27||8,550||8,550||64k||300
|-          
|28||9,450||9,450||70.6k||310
|-
|29||10.4k||10.4k||77.5k||320
|-          
|30||11.3k||11.3k||84.6k||330
|-          
|31||12.4k||12.4k||92.6k||340
|-          
|32||13.5k||13.5k||101k||350
|-          
|33||14.7k||14.7k||110k||360
|-          
|34||15.9k||15.9k||118k||370
|-          
|35||17.2k||17.2k||128k||380
|-          
|36||18.3k||18.3k||137k||390
|-          
|37||19.4k||19.4k||146k||400
|-
|38||21k||21k||157k||410
|-
|39||22.6k||22.6k||169k||420
|-
|40||24.2k||24.2k||182k||430
|-
|41||26k||26k||196k||440
|-
|42||27.8k||27.8k||208k||450
|-          
|43||30.4k||30.4k||224k||460
|-          
|44||32.4k||32.4k||239k||470
|-          
|45||34.5k||34.5k||255k||480
|-          
|46||36.8k||36.8k||271k||500
|-          
|47||39.2k||39.2k||288k||520
|-          
|48||41.9k||41.9k||308k||540
|-          
|49||44.1k||44.1k||326k||560
|-
|50||47k||47k||345k||580
|-
|51||49.7k||49.7k||365k||600
|-
|52||51k||51k||383k||630
|-
|53||54k||54k||404k||660
|-
|54||56.5k||56.5k||425k||690
|-
|55||60k||60k||450k||720
|-        
|56||63k||63k||473k||760
|-
|57||66.5k||66.5k||497k||800
|-          
|58||69.5k||69.5k||521k||850
|-          
|59||73.5k||73.5k||551k||900
|-
|60||78k||78k||583k||950
|-
|61||82k||82k||615k||1,000
|-
|62||86.5k||86.5k||650k||1,050
|-
|63||91k||91k||683k||1,100
|-
|64||96k||96k||719k||1,150
|-
|65||101k||101k||757k||1,200
|-         
|66||106k||106k||795k||1,250
|-         
|67||111k||111k||834k||1,300
|-         
|68||117k||117k||874k||1,350
|-         
|69||122k||122k||915k||1,400
|-         
|70||127k||127k||956k||1,450
|-         
|71||133k||133k||1.000M||1,500
|-         
|72||139k||139k||1.039M||1,550
|-         
|73||145k||145k||1.089M||1,600
|-         
|74||151k||151k||1.129M||1,650
|-         
|75||157k||157k||1.179M||1,700
|-         
|76||163k||163k||1.229M||1,720
|-         
|77||170k||170k||1.269M||1,740
|-         
|78||176k||176k||1.319M||1,760
|-         
|79||183k||183k||1.369M||1,780
|-         
|80||190k||190k||1.418M||1,800
|-         
|81||196k||196k||1.479M||1,820
|-         
|82||204k||204k||1.525M||1,840
|-         
|83||210k||210k||1.578M||1,860
|-         
|84||218k||218k||1.637M||1,880
|-         
|85||226k||226k||1.688M||1,900
|-         
|86||232k||232k||1.744M||1,910
|-         
|87||240k||240k||1.794M||1,920
|-         
|88||248k||248k||1.852M||1,930
|-         
|89||256k||256k||1.912M||1,940
|-         
|90||264k||264k||1.967M||1,950
|-         
|91||272k||272k||2.033M||1,960
|-         
|92||277k||277k||2.094M||1,970
|-         
|93||285k||285k||2.166M||1,980
|-         
|94||293k||293k||2.225M||1,990
|-         
|95||302k||302k||2.283M||1,995
|-         
|96||312k||312k||2.352M||1,997
|-         
|97||322k||322k||2.410M||1,998
|-         
|98||332k||332k||2.478M||1,999
|-         
|99||344k||344k||2.551M||2,000
|}

===Upgrade Cost Reduction===
[[:Category:Time Machine Upgrade Cost Reduction]]

===Relics with Time Machine Skills===
[[:Category:Time Machine Skill]]

==Lumber Camp==
The Lumber Camp generates {{RewardIconWithText|Wood}} normally and has the special power to generate {{RewardIconWithText|Ancient Wood}} as well. {{RewardIconWithText|Ancient Wood}} is just an item that can be used to create {{RewardIconWithText|Wood}} +2k.

===Upgrade Costs===
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
! rowspan="2" |Level
! colspan="4" |Cost

|-
!{{RewardIconWithText|Stone}}
!{{RewardIconWithText|Wood}}
!{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
!Total<br>Relic Stars

|-
|1||0||0||0||30
|-
|2||60||20||300||50
|-
|3||90||30||450||60
|-
|4||120||40||600||70
|-
|5||240||80||1,200||80
|-
|6||360||120||1,800||90
|-
|7||510||170||2,560||100
|-
|8||630||210||3,180||110
|-
|9||780||260||3,870||120
|-
|10||900||300||4,600||130
|-
|11||1,200||400||6,000||140
|-
|12||1,500||500||7,550||150
|-
|13||1,860||620||9,260||160
|-
|14||2,220||740||11.1k||170
|-
|15||2,700||900||13.4k||180
|-
|16||3,180||1,060||15.9k||190
|-
|17||3,720||1,240||18.6k||200
|-
|18||4,290||1,430||21.5k||210
|-
|19||4,980||1,660||24.9k||220
|-
|20||5,700||1,900||28.5k||230
|-
|21||6,450||2,150||32.3k||240
|-
|22||7,260||2,420||36.4k||250
|-
|23||8,220||2,740||41.1k||260
|-
|24||9,210||3,070||46k||270
|-
|25||10.2k||3,400||51.2k||280
|-
|26||11.3k||3,770||56.7k||290
|-
|27||12.8k||4,275||64k||300
|-
|28||14.2k||4,725||70.6k||310
|-
|29||15.5k||5,175||77.5k||320
|-
|30||17k||5,650||84.6k||330
|-
|31||18.5k||6,175||92.6k||340
|-
|32||20.3k||6,750||101k||350
|-
|33||22k||7,325||110k||360
|-
|34||23.8k||7,925||118k||370
|-
|35||25.7k||8,575||128k||380
|-
|36||27.5k||9,150||137k||390
|-
|37||29.1k||9,700||146k||400
|-
|38||31.5k||10.5k||157k||410
|-
|39||33.9k||11.3k||169k||420
|-
|40||36.3k||12.1k||182k||430
|-
|41||38.9k||13k||196k||440
|-
|42||41.6k||13.9k||208k||450
|-
|43||45.6k||15.2k||224k||460
|-
|44||48.6k||16.2k||239k||470
|-
|45||51.8k||17.3k||255k||480
|-
|46||55.1k||18.4k||271k||500
|-
|47||58.8k||19.6k||288k||520
|-
|48||62.8k||20.9k||308k||540
|-
|49||66.2k||22.1k||326k||560
|-
|50||70.4k||23.5k||345k||580
|-
|51||74.6k||24.9k||365k||600
|-
|52||76.5k||25.5k||383k||630
|-
|53||81k||27k||404k||660
|-
|54||84.8k||28.3k||425k||690
|-
|55||90k||30k||450k||720
|-
|56||94.5k||31.5k||473k||760
|-
|57||99.8k||33.3k||497k||800
|-
|58||104k||34.8k||521k||850
|-
|59||110k||36.8k||551k||900
|-
|60||117k||39k||583k||950
|-
|61||123k||41k||615k||1,000
|-
|62||130k||43.3k||650k||1,050
|-
|63||137k||45.5k||683k||1,100
|-
|64||144k||48k||719k||1,150
|-
|65||152k||50.5k||757k||1,200
|-
|66||158k||52.8k||795k||1,250
|-
|67||167k||55.5k||834k||1,300
|-
|68||175k||58.3k||874k||1,350
|-
|69||182k||60.8k||915k||1,400
|-
|70||191k||63.5k||956k||1,450
|-
|71||200k||66.5k||1.000M||1,500
|-
|72||208k||69.3k||1.039M||1,550
|-
|73||217k||72.3k||1.089M||1,600
|-
|74||227k||75.5k||1.129M||1,650
|-
|75||236k||78.5k||1.179M||1,700
|-
|76||244k||81.3k||1.229M||1,720
|-
|77||254k||84.8k||1.269M||1,740
|-
|78||263k||87.8k||1.319M||1,760
|-
|79||275k||91.5k||1.369M||1,780
|-
|80||284k||94.8k||1.418M||1,800
|-
|81||294k||98k||1.479M||1,820
|-
|82||305k||102k||1.525M||1,840
|-
|83||314k||105k||1.578M||1,860
|-
|84||326k||109k||1.637M||1,880
|-
|85||338k||113k||1.688M||1,900
|-
|86||347k||116k||1.744M||1,910
|-
|87||359k||120k||1.794M||1,920
|-
|88||371k||124k||1.852M||1,930
|-
|89||383k||128k||1.912M||1,940
|-
|90||395k||132k||1.967M||1,950
|-
|91||407k||136k||2.033M||1,960
|-
|92||416k||139k||2.094M||1,970
|-
|93||427k||142k||2.166M||1,980
|-
|94||439k||146k||2.225M||1,990
|-
|95||453k||151k||2.283M||1,995
|-
|96||468k||156k||2.352M||1,997
|-
|97||483k||161k||2.410M||1,998
|-
|98||498k||166k||2.478M||1,999
|-
|99||516k||172k||2.551M||2,000
|}

===Upgrade Cost Reduction===
[[:Category:Lumber Camp Upgrade Cost Reduction]]

===Relics with Lumber Camp Skills===
[[:Category:Lumber Camp Skill]]

==Quarry==
The Quarry generates {{RewardIconWithText|Stone}} normally and has the special power to generate {{RewardIconWithText|Ancient Fossil}} as well. {{RewardIconWithText|Ancient Fossil}} is just an item that can be used to create {{RewardIconWithText|Stone}} +2k.

===Upgrade Costs===
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
! rowspan="2" |Level
! colspan="4" |Cost

|-
!{{RewardIconWithText|Stone}}
!{{RewardIconWithText|Wood}}
!{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
!Total<br>Relic Stars

|-
|1||0||0||0||30
|-
|2||20||60||300||50
|-
|3||30||90||450||60
|-
|4||40||120||600||70
|-
|5||80||240||1,200||80
|-
|6||120||360||1,800||90
|-
|7||170||510||2,560||100
|-
|8||210||630||3,180||110
|-
|9||260||780||3,870||120
|-
|10||300||900||4,600||130
|-
|11||400||1,200||6,000||140
|-
|12||500||1,500||7,550||150
|-
|13||620||1,860||9,260||160
|-
|14||740||2,220||11.1k||170
|-
|15||900||2,700||13.4k||180
|-
|16||1,060||3,180||15.9k||190
|-
|17||1,240||3,720||18.6k||200
|-
|18||1,430||4,290||21.5k||210
|-
|19||1,660||4,980||24.9k||220
|-
|20||1,900||5,700||28.5k||230
|-
|21||2,150||6,450||32.3k||240
|-
|22||2,420||7,260||36.4k||250
|-
|23||2,740||8,220||41.1k||260
|-
|24||3,070||,210||46k||270
|-
|25||3,400||10.2k||51.2k||280
|-
|26||3,770||11.3k||56.7k||290
|-
|27||4,275||12.8k||64k||300
|-
|28||4,725||14.2k||70.6k||310
|-
|29||5,175||15.5k||77.5k||320
|-
|30||5,650||17k||84.6k||330
|-
|31||6,175||18.5k||92.6k||340
|-
|32||6,750||20.3k||101k||350
|-
|33||7,325||22k||110k||360
|-
|34||7,925||23.8k||118k||370
|-
|35||8,575||25.7k||128k||380
|-
|36||9,150||27.5k||137k||390
|-
|37||9,700||29.1k||146k||400
|-
|38||10.5k||31.5k||157k||410
|-
|39||11.3k||33.9k||169k||420
|-
|40||12.1k||36.3k||182k||430
|-
|41||13k||38.9k||196k||440
|-
|42||13.9k||41.6k||208k||450
|-
|43||15.2k||45.6k||224k||460
|-
|44||16.2k||48.6k||239k||470
|-
|45||17.3k||51.8k||255k||480
|-
|46||18.4k||55.1k||271k||500
|-
|47||19.6k||58.8k||288k||520
|-
|48||20.9k||62.8k||308k||540
|-
|49||22.1k||66.2k||326k||560
|-
|50||23.5k||70.4k||345k||580
|-
|51||24.9k||74.6k||365k||600
|-
|52||25.5k||76.5k||383k||630
|-
|53||27k||81k||404k||660
|-
|54||28.3k||84.8k||425k||690
|-
|55||30k||90k||450k||720
|-
|56||31.5k||94.5k||473k||760
|-
|57||33.3k||99.8k||497k||800
|-
|58||34.8k||104k||521k||850
|-
|59||36.8k||110k||551k||900
|-
|60||39k||117k||583k||950
|-
|61||41k||123k||615k||1,000
|-
|62||43.3k||130k||650k||1,050
|-
|63||45.5k||137k||683k||1,100
|-
|64||48k||144k||719k||1,150
|-
|65||50.5k||152k||757k||1,200
|-
|66||52.8k||158k||795k||1,250
|-
|67||55.5k||167k||834k||1,300
|-
|68||58.3k||175k||874k||1,350
|-
|69||60.8k||182k||915k||1,400
|-
|70||63.5k||91k||956k||1,450
|-
|71||66.5k||200k||1.000M||1,500
|-
|72||69.3k||208k||1.039M||1,550
|-
|73||72.3k||217k||1.089M||1,600
|-
|74||75.5k||227k||1.129M||1,650
|-
|75||78.5k||236k||1.179M||1,700
|-
|76||81.3k||244k||1.229M||1,720
|-
|77||84.8k||254k||1.269M||1,740
|-
|78||87.8k||263k||1.319M||1,760
|-
|79||91.5k||275k||1.369M||1,780
|-
|80||94.8k||284k||1.418M||1,800
|-
|81||98k||294k||1.479M||1,820
|-
|82||102k||305k||1.525M||1,840
|-
|83||105k||314k||1.578M||1,860
|-
|84||109k||326k||1.637M||1,880
|-
|85||113k||338k||1.688M||1,900
|-
|86||116k||347k||1.744M||1,910
|-
|87||120k||359k||1.794M||1,920
|-
|88||124k||371k||1.852M||1,930
|-
|89||128k||383k||1.912M||1,940
|-
|90||132k||395k||1.967M||1,950
|-
|91||136k||407k||2.033M||1,960
|-
|92||139k||416k||2.094M||1,970
|-
|93||142k||427k||2.166M||1,980
|-
|94||146k||439k||2.225M||1,990
|-
|95||151k||453k||2.283M||1,995
|-
|96||156k||468k||2.352M||1,997
|-
|97||161k||483k||2.410M||1,998
|-
|98||166k||498k||2.478M||1,999
|-
|99||172k||516k||2.551M||2,000
|}

===Upgrade Cost Reduction===
[[:Category:Quarry Upgrade Cost Reduction]]

===Relics with Quarry Skills===
[[:Category:Quarry Skill]]

[[Category:Courtyard]]
[[Category:Fungus Farm]]
[[Category:Lumber Camp]]
[[Category:Quarry]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond]]
[[Category:Time Machine]]
